message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Ausbildungs- und Berufsverläufe bayerischer Abiturienten 1970 (Bayern-Abiturienten-Panel)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4873","justification":"Panel survey of Bavarian Abitur graduates starting in 1970, focusing on educational and occupational careers including entry into higher and further education in Bavaria during the 1970s."},{"title":"Studenten-Survey 1976: Studenten in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4878","justification":"Nationwide student survey including regional indicators; enables analyses of higher education participation and study conditions in Bavaria in the mid‑1970s."},{"title":"Studenten-Survey 1978: Studenten in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4880","justification":"Follow‑up nationwide student survey with variables on university, subject and region, allowing disaggregation and comparison of higher education structures in Bavaria in the late 1970s."},{"title":"Bildungsverläufe und soziale Mobilität in Bayern 1960–1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5120","justification":"Retrospective life‑course survey for Bavarian cohorts covering schooling, vocational training and higher education, with a specific temporal focus on the 1960s and 1970s in Bavaria."},{"title":"Berufsbildung und Weiterbildung in Bayern 1973","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5135","justification":"Survey on vocational education and continuing education (Weiterbildung) in Bavaria, centred on opportunities and participation in further education in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Studienberechtigte 1976: Übergang in Studium und Beruf (regionale Auswertung Bayern)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5152","justification":"Dataset on school‑leavers with university entrance qualification, including regional breakdowns and specific evaluation files for Bavaria to study transitions into higher education and vocational pathways."},{"title":"Hochschulentwicklung in Bayern 1965–1979: Statistik der Studierenden und Absolventen","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5201","justification":"Aggregated higher education statistics for Bavarian universities and Fachhochschulen covering enrolments and graduates across the 1970s."},{"title":"Sozialerhebung des Deutschen Studentenwerks 1973 (mit Länderkennzeichnung)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4875","justification":"Social survey of students with regional identifiers; can be filtered to analyse living conditions, finance and study organisation of students enrolled at Bavarian institutions in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Sozialerhebung des Deutschen Studentenwerks 1976 (mit Länderkennzeichnung)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4876","justification":"Continuation of the student social survey including state‑level identification, enabling analyses focusing specifically on higher education students in Bavaria in 1976."},{"title":"Sozialerhebung des Deutschen Studentenwerks 1979 (mit Länderkennzeichnung)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4877","justification":"Late‑1970s wave of the student social survey; regional flags allow research on higher education participation and student conditions in Bavaria at the end of the decade."}]}
